name: Home Assistant
desc_en: Home automation dashboard — lights, sensors, automations.
desc_fr: Tableau de bord domotique — lumières, capteurs, automatisations.

name: Vaultwarden
desc_fr: Gestionnaire de mots de passe auto-hébergé, compatible Bitwarden.

name: WGDashboard
desc_en: WireGuard VPN management dashboard — peers, tunnels, traffic monitoring.
desc_fr: Interface de gestion WireGuard — pairs, tunnels, supervision du trafic.

name: Grafana
desc_en: Metrics and observability dashboards — infrastructure, services, alerts.
desc_fr: Dashboards de métriques et d'observabilité — infrastructure, services, alertes.

name: Arcane
desc_en: Docker management frontend — containers, images, volumes, logs.
desc_fr: Frontend de gestion Docker — conteneurs, images, volumes, logs.

name: n8n
desc_en: Workflow automation platform — integrations, triggers, pipelines.
desc_fr: Plateforme d'automatisation de workflows — intégrations, déclencheurs, pipelines.

name: Wiki.js
desc_en: Self-hosted wiki and documentation platform — notes, runbooks, knowledge base.
desc_fr: Wiki et plateforme de documentation auto-hébergés — notes, runbooks, base de connaissances.

name: Proxmox
desc_en: Hypervisor management interface — VMs, containers, storage. Requires WireGuard tunnel.
desc_fr: Interface de gestion de l'hyperviseur — VMs, conteneurs, stockage. Nécessite le tunnel WireGuard.
